task_description: Gather all existing Vulkan implementation information in the codebase and create a plan to implement Vulkan compute using a shared folder structure for crossbar (module2) and circuits (module4) modules
critic_feedback: OKAY - Plan approved on first iteration. All file references verified, acceptance criteria concrete, phasing correct. Minor recommendations incorporated: headless Vulkan init pattern documented, GPU accelerator API specified, quantize.comp purpose clarified.
